race.description: Sounds Of The Mountain Fm96.3 Hcp (Bm50)
race.comment: ROULLOTTIE (12) pushed forward from a wide draw last start and kept going to win by 2.25 lengths over 1400m at Narrandera. One of the top chances again. DUBAI FOUNTAIN (7) finished sixth last time out over 1400m at Bendigo, beaten 1.75 lengths. Deserves serious consideration from the better gate. SECTORS (11) was unplaced two runs back when fresh from a spell then again missed the frame last start the seventh over 1400m at Narrandera. Better than recent efforts suggest. NATIONAL ASSET (5) strips fitter second-up and looks best of the rest.
